final:
module top_module(
    input obf_a,
    input b,
    input sel_b1,
    input sel_b2,
    output wire out_assign,
    output reg out_always   );assign out_assign = (sel_b1&sel_b2)?b:obf_a;
    
    always@(*) begin
        if (sel_b1&sel_b2) begin
            out_always = b;
        end
        else begin
            out_always = obf_a;
        end
    end
endmodule
